description_long: This is a heavy-duty sledgehammer with a robust, rectangular steel head and a solid, straight handle. The head is a dark gray color, featuring flat striking faces on both ends and a central hole or indentation on each side, typical of sledgehammer designs. The handle appears to be made of wood or a composite material, finished in a dark brown shade, and is wrapped with a textured, grippy section for improved handling and shock absorption. The proportions suggest a tool designed for delivering powerful blows, suitable for demolition or driving stakes in urban construction or maintenance settings. The overall build is utilitarian, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The hammer appears clean and unused, with no visible signs of wear, damage, or additional attachments.
description: A robust sledgehammer with a dark gray rectangular steel head and a straight, dark brown handle featuring a textured grip. The tool is clean, utilitarian, and designed for heavy-duty urban tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the rectangular hammer head and the straight handle with a textured grip.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the hammer head and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the opposite striking face and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the slim profile of the head and handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a textured, rubberized grip section for enhanced hold and shock absorption.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head made of steel, featuring flat striking faces on both ends and a central indentation.
